problem.title_highlight: Don't Have a Consistent Flow of Consult Calls
problem.description: Great clinics often rely on referrals or inconsistent marketing, leaving their implant and veneer consult calendars half full. Booked.Dental focuses on generating qualified consultation calls from patients already considering treatment.
problem.bullet3: No vanity metrics or confusing reports

services.subtitle: A patient acquisition system designed specifically for high-value treatments like implants and veneers.
services.creative_library_desc: Our campaigns use a library of high-performing UGC-style ads built specifically for implant and cosmetic dental clinics. These proven formats stop the scroll and attract patients already considering treatment.
services.fast_launch_desc: Because the creative foundation already exists, campaigns launch quickly without long testing phases.
services.quality_inquiries_desc: Our ads attract patients already considering implants or veneers, generating consult calls from people ready for treatment.
services.efficient_costs_desc: Using proven creatives allows us to operate more efficiently than agencies that build campaigns from scratch, allowing us to offer a powerful patient acquisition system for just $1,000 per month.
services.call_tracking_desc: Campaigns are optimized for consultation calls lasting two minutes or longer — focusing on real treatment discussions instead of low-quality leads.
services.ai_booking_desc: AI phone agents answer incoming calls and automatically book consultation appointments so your staff can focus on patient care.

how_it_works.step1_desc: Before anything else, we confirm your market is open. We only work with one clinic per area, so your competitors can't access the same system. Once confirmed, we build a custom acquisition strategy around your treatments and local competition.
how_it_works.step2_desc: We launch from a proven library of high-converting ad creatives built specifically for implant and cosmetic dental clinics. No guesswork. No building from scratch. Your campaigns go live fast, typically within 48 hours of onboarding.
how_it_works.step3_desc: Campaigns are optimized using advanced call tracking focused on consultation calls lasting 2+ minutes. AI phone agents answer incoming calls and automatically book consultation appointments so your team can stay focused on patients in the clinic.

case_studies.subtitle: The numbers behind real patient acquisition campaigns.
case_studies.clinic1_name: Full Arch Implant Clinic — Phoenix, AZ
case_studies.clinic1_challenge: Struggling to fill chairs despite $5K/mo in ad spend with a generic agency. Getting form leads that never converted.
case_studies.clinic1_result: 67 qualified calls from dental implant patients in 90 days at $22 per call. 18 full arch cases booked worth $540K+ in production.
case_studies.clinic2_challenge: Brand new practice with zero patient base. Needed a fast, scalable system to build momentum.
case_studies.clinic2_result: 42 qualified calls in 60 days. 14 veneer cases closed averaging $12K each — $168K in revenue from $2,800 in ad spend.

market_exclusivity.description: Booked.Dental works with only one implant or cosmetic dental clinic per local market. Once a clinic secures a market, we do not work with competing practices in that area. Market availability is confirmed during the strategy call. If your city is still open, you can secure it before another clinic does. When your market is secured, no competing practice in your area gains access to our system, creatives, or campaigns.
market_exclusivity.point1_title: Your competitors can't buy in once you do.
market_exclusivity.point1_desc: When your market is secured, no competing practice in your area gains access to our system, our creatives, or our campaigns.
market_exclusivity.point2_title: Market availability is confirmed on the strategy call.
market_exclusivity.point2_desc: If your market is open, you can secure it during the call — before another clinic in your area does.

testimonials.subtitle: Real feedback from implant and cosmetic practices using the system.

roi_calculator.subtitle: Implant and cosmetic dentistry are high-value treatments. That means even a small increase in consults can dramatically impact your monthly production. Use the calculator below to estimate how additional cases could affect your practice.
roi_calculator.insight_bold: Even one additional high-ticket case can justify months of marketing investment.
roi_calculator.insight_rest: Booked.Dental focuses on generating qualified consult calls that can turn into these types of cases.

cta.subtitle: If your clinic has capacity for more implant or veneer cases, check if your market is still available. Booked.Dental partners with only one clinic per local market.
cta.footer: No contracts. No obligation. Just a clear conversation about growing your practice.

faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about how Booked.Dental works before checking if your market is available.
faq.q1: How quickly can we start receiving consult calls?
faq.a1: Most clinics begin receiving consult inquiries within about 7 days of campaign launch, depending on market conditions and ad approval timelines.
faq.q2: How much ad spend should we expect?
faq.a2: Ad spend varies by market and competition, but most clinics start between $1,000 and $3,000 per month in ad budget. The goal is to generate high-value cases where even a single treatment can cover months of marketing.
faq.q3: Do you guarantee exclusivity in my market?
faq.a3: Yes. Booked.Dental works with only one clinic per local market. Once a clinic secures a market, we do not work with competing practices in that area.
faq.q4: What types of clinics does Booked.Dental work with?
faq.a4: We work with clinics focused on high-ticket treatments such as full-arch implants, All-on-4 procedures, and cosmetic veneers that have capacity for additional consults.
faq.a5: We use call tracking and campaign attribution to monitor incoming consult calls and campaign performance so you can see exactly how many inquiries your campaigns generate.
faq.q6: How do you measure call quality?
faq.a6: Booked.Dental uses advanced call tracking to measure consultation conversations and optimize campaigns toward calls lasting two minutes or longer.
faq.q7: What happens when a patient calls?
faq.a7: AI phone agents answer incoming calls, respond instantly to missed calls, and can automatically book consultation appointments for your practice.
faq.a8: No. Qualified clinics can start with a trial period to evaluate the system before committing long term.
faq.walk_through: and we'll walk you through everything.
